scripts.dev: node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && npm run build:css && vite
scripts.dev:sandbox: node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && wrangler pages dev dist --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:d1: node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && wrangler pages dev dist --d1=mindstory-production --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.build: npm run build:css && vite build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.preview: node scripts/sync-openai-from-env.mjs && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: node scripts/pages-deploy-preflight.mjs && npm run verify:no-api-keys && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name mslms --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message "mslms deploy"
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/pages-deploy-preflight.mjs && npm run verify:no-api-keys && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name mslms --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message "mslms deploy"
scripts.git:init: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'
